rulings.Case Title: KEVIN DORGAN VS. EDWARD CHUTE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Crossdefendant Kevin Dorgans Notice Of Motion And Motion For Mandatory Attorneys Fees And Costs Ccp 425.16
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2020, line 1. PLAINTIFF KEVIN DORGAN Crossdefendant Kevin Dorgans Notice Of Motion And Motion For Mandatory Attorneys Fees And Costs Ccp 425.16 is GRANTED in the amount of $54,725 (99.5 hours reasonably and necessarily spent on the motion which was granted in part and fee motion at $550/hour). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RITA CARRANZA VS. JAVIER SANCHEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2020, line 2. PLAINTIFF RITA CARRANZA Notice Of Motion For Leave is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally, no proof of service for Supplemental Declaration filed on December 7, 2020 on file. Finally, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRSTINE GAYOSO ET AL VS. IRENE NI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2020, line 3. DEFENDANT IRENE NI, DAVID NI, LILIN NI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike is DENIED. Facts in support of request for punitive damages are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CYRUS ESTEBAN ET AL VS. CIVIC FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Civic Financial Services, Llcs Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2020, line 4. DEFENDANT CIVIC FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC Defendant Civic Financial Services, Llcs Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED with leave to amend for each Plaintiff to allege each element of each cause of action with requisite particularity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DELORES HOTEL, LLC VS. JENNIFER DECALLOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2020, line 5. DEFENDANT JENNIFER DACALLOS MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
